Description: AI squads detect the player based on proximity and attacks.
Example Use Case: PMCs turn hostile if the player attacks nearby.

Description: AI belongs to different factions with unique behaviors.
Example Use Case: Iron Reavers and Dust Vipers react differently.

Description: AI units operate in squads and respond collectively.
Example Use Case: A squad attacks together if provoked.

Description: AI knowledge changes based on witnessing or hearing events.
Example Use Case: A PMC squad hears a gunshot and investigates.

Description: AI switches between neutral, hostile, and investigating.
Example Use Case: A squad remains neutral until it sees an attack.

Description: Hostile squads move toward the player when aggressive.
Example Use Case: After being attacked, PMCs chase the player.

Description: Neutral squads investigate attacks in their vicinity.
Example Use Case: A squad moves toward a disturbance but does not attack immediately.

Description: AI squads react to events based on distance.
Example Use Case: A squad 10m away witnesses an attack and turns hostile.

Description: AI squads speak lines based on their state.
Example Use Case: A PMC squad shouts, Hold the line! when attacking.

Description: Different factions have distinct colors for easy identification.
Example Use Case: Iron Reavers are red, and Dust Vipers are yellow.
